zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux於大約1126年出生在英國英格蘭戴文維恩 奧特利時，他的父親Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux28歲，母親Unknown49歲。他於1148年與Lady Mathilda在英國薩默塞特吉爾福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1158年在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux于大约1126年出生在英国英格兰戴文維恩 奧特利时，他的父亲Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux28岁，母亲Unknown49岁。他于1148年与Lady Mathilda在英国薩默塞特吉爾福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1158年在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furneaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in Normandy called Fourneaux ‘(the) furnaces’, one in Manche, the other in Calvados. Compare   Furnace   and   Furnell  .

variants.name: Furney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Furneaux  . It may sometimes have been confused with   Furness  ; the two names have variants in common (see   Furnace  ).

variants.name: Fornell
meanings: English: variant of Furneaux , or a nickname from Middle English fornel ‘small oven or furnace’.

variants.name: Furnace
meanings: (of Norman origin): sometimes a variant of   Furneaux  .

variants.name: Furnell
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a variant of   Farnell  . Compare   Funnell  .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux was born about 1126, in Venn Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux, was 28 and his mother, Unknown, was 49. He married Lady Mathilda in 1148, in Kilve, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died about 1158, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux est né environ 1126, à Venn Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mathilda en 1148, à Kilve, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé environ 1158, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux um 1126 in Venn Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux 28 und seine Mutter Unknown 49. Er hat 1148 in Kilve, Somerset, England Lady Mathilda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb um 1158 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux è nato il circa 1126 nel Venn Ottery, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Unknown, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mathilda nel 1148, nel Kilve, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1158, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Furneauxが約1126年にイギリスイギリスデボンベン オッテリーで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneuxは28歳，母Unknownは49歳であった。1148年にイギリスソメルセトキルブでLady Mathildaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は約1158年に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux(이)가 대략 1126년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 벤 오터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1148년 영국 서머세트 킬브에서 Lady Mathilda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1158년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey de Furneaux родился около 1126 г. в местности венн оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alan Vermandois de Furneux было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mathilda в 1148 г. в местности килв, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер около 1158 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.
